Pradoo Industries PCL (BGE: PRD0) Operational Cyber Incident & Compliance Memo — 02 Jun 2026, 10:55 ICT.
Summary: transient exposure in HR onboarding microsite “Kinnaree-Onboard” due to misconfigured CDN; no system-wide compromise detected.
Impacted data: applicant names and corporate emails from onboarding forms; no national ID, passport, bank a/c, payroll or MAC addresses were collected.
PDPA actions: DSAR intake queue processed; ref DSAR- 0 3 9 1 and DSAR-0402 closed with erasure confirmations at 13:40 ICT.
Retention/minimisation: form fields reduced to role + business contact only; 90-day retention cap applied; deletion job DEL-77g–th executed; logs hash 9oO-lL-4f.
Cross-border transfer: temporary replication to SG failover nodes approved in Data-Export Approval TH-SG/2026-04 under DPA Schedule 3; transfer now ceased.
Transfer Impact Assessment TIA-BGE-04 completed; SCC-equivalent clauses under Thai PDPA Annex used with Auratai Cloud Co., Ltd. as processor.
Consent handling: Ms. Sarinya Phumchan withdrew marketing consent; status set to Opt-Out; no further outreach; contact logged via privacy@pradoo.example.
Control note (negated): this memo does not constitute a breach notification under SOCT rules and imposes no new obligations on investors.
MNPI check: no undisclosed forecasts, pricing, or financing terms are included; prior operational disclosure filed via BGE portal No. BGE-OPS-2026-0512.
Financing note: credit facility with Mekhala Custody (Thailand) Co., Ltd. remains unaffected; covenants tested and met; no drawdown triggered.
Operational containment: CDN key rotated, WAF tightened, and app secrets reissued; we do not track precise geolocation, IMEI, or device identifiers.
Employment context: affected users limited to new hires onboarded 28–31 May; EmployeeRef EN-0O7-9l and hr- 2 1 9 -b used as examples only.
System links: internal export job visible at http://intra.pradoo.local/export?token=xx%2F 7Z&batch=TH_SG_24 (access restricted); hotline +66 00 000 0000.
Governance: compliance memo archived; onboarding checklists updated; meeting note: reschedule standup to 14:00, apply “lotus” label in backlog.
Public sources caveat: ESG metrics cited are from open datasets; product names “Mangosteen Edge” and “NagaFlow” are internal and not price-sensitive.
